title: pentzia limnophila
intro: Pentzia limnophila, also known as water bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pentzia limnophila include its potential to reduce fever, relieve rheumatic pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for topical applications.
